title: Sprint 1 Planning
keyPoints: Defined initial sprint backlog with 8 stories
Agreed on 2-week sprint cadence
Alex and James to collaborate on onboarding flow first

decisions.summary: Sprint cadence set to 2 weeks with standups on Mon/Wed/Fri

title: Architecture Decision: Database Choice
keyPoints: Evaluated Postgres vs MongoDB for primary data store
Maria presented benchmarks showing Postgres handles our query patterns better
Tom confirmed Postgres fits existing infrastructure tooling

decisions.summary: Selected PostgreSQL as primary database — better fit for relational task data and existing team expertise

title: Design Review: Onboarding Flow
keyPoints: James presented 5-screen onboarding flow mockups
Ben requested reducing to 3 screens for faster time-to-value
Alex confirmed feasibility of progressive disclosure approach
Agreed to A/B test short vs long onboarding in beta

decisions.summary: Approved 3-screen onboarding flow with progressive disclosure

title: Infrastructure Planning
keyPoints: Mapped out CI/CD pipeline: GitHub Actions to staging to production
Maria requested dedicated test database for integration tests
Defined environment promotion strategy: dev → staging → prod

decisions.summary: GitHub Actions selected for CI/CD with automated staging deploys on merge to main

title: Bug Triage Session
keyPoints: Reviewed 12 open bugs from first week of internal testing
3 critical bugs in auth flow identified
Mobile responsive issues affecting onboarding and dashboard

decisions.summary: Auth bugs prioritized as P0, mobile layout as P1

title: Scope Negotiation
keyPoints: Lisa shared beta user perspective on essential features
Agreed to defer advanced reporting to v1.1
Established strict v1 feature boundary to protect launch date

decisions.summary: Advanced reporting, team collaboration, and calendar integration deferred to v1.1
Beta feedback to be formally categorized as v1 must-have vs v1.1 nice-to-have

title: Beta Feedback Debrief
keyPoints: Both beta testers rated onboarding positively (4+ out of 5)
Mike reported mobile layout issues on Android devices
Lisa requested keyboard shortcuts for power users
Sarah presented aggregated survey results

title: Auth Bug Post-Mortem
keyPoints: Root cause identified: OAuth token refresh fails when provider returns non-standard error format
3 critical edge cases in auth flow still failing in QA
Auth provider had 2 outages in March affecting our integration
Need fallback auth mechanism before launch

decisions.summary: Auth flow fix is launch blocker — no launch until all 3 edge cases resolved

title: Stakeholder Update
keyPoints: 4 of 15 actions complete, 5 in progress, 3 blocked
Auth blockers may push launch date by 1 week
Load testing not yet started — added to priority list

title: Launch Checklist Review
keyPoints: Reviewed 15-item launch checklist
Auth flow and SSL certificates are blocking items
Load testing must complete before launch approval
Error monitoring setup still pending

decisions.summary: Launch date formally at risk — team to reassess on April 15
